utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all five of these items are present. Each one is fully specified with both the required coverage details and explicit monthly and annual costs (where applicable). The total_budget section also provides the complete monthly and annual totals. Therefore, all 5 items are included and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan chosen by the AI assistant includes four LifeFirst coverages: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, and additional_services. The corresponding items in the ground-truth ratings are: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage (rating 9), 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection (rating 9), and 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage/travel_insurance (rating 9). The 'additional_services' correspond most closely to 'Premium Insurance Membership' under general_services (rating 6). Therefore, we map each selected coverage to its corresponding rating.
